ksa_text: Knowledge of cloud data platform services and infrastructure across major providers, including managed compute, serverless processing, object storage, data warehouse, streaming platforms, and their architectural implications for data and ML workloads.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-K-015 (AI & ML/Knowledge) scores 0.410 composite (highest: DCWF at 0.410). Scope is edge_case for Clinical AI Specialist: 1 in-scope signals, 1 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, AI & ML, composite 0.410. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support AI & ML for Clinical AI Specialist?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI & ML appears in approximately 90% of Clinical AI Specialist job postings. AI/ML competencies are the primary hiring criterion for Clinical AI Specialist roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. AI & ML is market-validated for Clinical AI Specialist. Final decision: include.
